---
title: "Предиктивный контроль качества стекла по химическому составу"
author: "Data Analysis Portfolio"
date: "2026"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  out.width = "100%"
)
